query:
SELECT ms.id, ms.alunoId, ms.consultorId, ms.sessionDate, ms.sessionNumber 
FROM mentoring_sessions ms 
WHERE ms.alunoId = 30035 AND ms.consultorId = 39
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2kPX7CjhqdMFT8y.9c22f9f54902 --database 5n7arrGNHjNdoFCMzyGXcY --execute SELECT ms.id, ms.alunoId, ms.consultorId, ms.sessionDate, ms.sessionNumber
